global.policy_agreement: Ngokubhalisa, uyavumelana nenqubomgomo yobumfihlo kanye nemigomo nemibandela
global.retrying_answer_submission_check_network: Izama ukuhanjiswa kwempendulo ... Hlola ukuxhumeka kwakho kwenethiwekhi ...
global.check_webgl_description: Kubonakala sengathi isiphequluli sakho asiyisekeli i-WebGL. Sebenzisa isixhumanisi esingezansi ukuze uxazulule le nkinga.
global.expiry_alert_text: Ikhodi yakho yokubhalisa iphelelwa yisikhathi maduze (kusele izinsuku ezingu-{daysValue}). Ngemva kokuphelelwa yisikhathi, ngeke usakwazi ukufinyelela i-akhawunti yakho. Sicela uxhumane nomphathi weqembu lakho noma umfundisi ukuze ufunde ukuthi ungakuthola kanjani ukufinyelela okunwetshiwe.
global.under_maintenance_message: Okwamanje senza ukulungisa okuhleliwe ukuze sithuthukise ulwazi lwakho.
global.under_maintenance_description: Sicela uhlole futhi ngemva kwesikhashana. Siyaxolisa nganoma yikuphi ukuphazamiseka.
global.delete_tranlate_confirmation: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa lokhu kuhumusha?
global.injector_activity_directions: Sicela ugcwalise ukugqama namasirinji e-saline ngawodwana ngamavolumu afanelekile adingekayo ukuze wenze lolu hlolo lwe- {bodyPartName} . Uma amavolumu esekhethiwe, khetha inkinobho ethi "OKULANDELAYO" ukuze uqhubeke.
global.patient_position_directions: Sicela ukhethe indawo yesiguli ongathanda ukuyenza ukuze wenze lokhu kuhlolwa kwe-{bodyPartName} . Uma isikhundla sesikhethiwe, khetha inkinobho ethi "OKULANDELAYO" ukuze uqhubeke.
global.patient_landmarking_directions: Usebenzisa i-laser nezinkinobho zokuzulazula, sicela ususe isiguli kanye netafula endaweni ofisa ukukuphawula ngendawo ukuze kwenziwe okwasendaweni ngaphakathi kwalokhu kuhlolwa kwe- {bodyPartName} bese ukhetha okuthi "Qinisekisa I-Landmark". Uma isici sendawo sesikhethiwe, khetha inkinobho ethi "OKULANDELAYO" ukuze uqhubeke.
global.patient_position_is_incorrect: Indawo oyikhethile yesiguli ayilungile.  Sicela ukhethe okulandelayo ezikhundleni zesiguli ezingaba khona ezibalwe ngezansi.
global.delete_all_point_selection: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa konke okukhethiwe kwamaphoyinti?
global.delete_all_sat_band: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa yonke indawo ye-sat band?
global.set_scan_description: Uma ufisa ukusebenzisa indlela ethi "Setha Ukubambezeleka" ukuze Unqume isikhathi sesigaba, Sicela ufake ukubambezeleka kokuskena emibuzweni oyifunayo mathupha.
global.is_contrast_duration_greater_than_scan_d: Ubude beskena (i-UI) abukwazi ukuba bukhulu kunobude bokuQhathanisa (i-UI yomjovo).
global.is_contrast_duration_longer_than_scan_du: Ubude bokuqhathanisa abukwazi ukuba ngaphezu kwamasekhondi angu-5 ubude kunobude bokuskena.
global.image_duration_shorter_than_contrast_dur: Ubude besithombe uma buqhathaniswa nobude bokugqama.
global.delete_this_profile: Uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukususa le phrofayela?
global.create_new_profile: Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukudala iphrofayela entsha?
global.duplicate_profile: Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukuphinda le phrofayela?
global.save_all_patient_positions: Ingabe uqinisekile ukuthi ufuna ukulondoloza zonke izindawo zesiguli zazo zonke izingxenye zomzimba zemodeli ekhethiwe?

Le migomo nemibandela yokusebenzisa (“Imigomo Yokusebenzisa”) ibeka imigomo ebophezela ngokusemthethweni yokusebenzisa kwakho iSayithi. Le Migomo Yokusebenzisa izosebenza kungakhathaliseki ukuthi ufinyelela noma ulisebenzisa kanjani iSayithi, noma ngabe usebenzisa ikhompuyutha, ithebhulethi, idivayisi yeselula, iwashi elihlakaniphile, ikhonsoli, noma ngenye indlela. noma yiziphi izinhlelo zokusebenza zeselula ezithumela isixhumanisi kuleli khasi. Uma ungavumelani nanoma yimiphi yale Migomo Yokusebenzisa noma Inqubomgomo Yobumfihlo, sicela ungasebenzisi iSayithi bese uphuma manje.

TermsAndConditions.modification_to_these_terms_description: Singangeza, sibuyekeze, sisuse noma siguqule iSayithi nganoma yisiphi isikhathi ngokubona kwethu. Sigodla ilungelo, nganoma yisiphi isikhathi futhi ngezikhathi ezithile, nganoma yisiphi isizathu, ukushintsha Imigomo Yokusebenzisa. Singase sithumele noma sibonise izaziso zezinguquko zeMigomo Yokusebenzisa Engosini noma singakwazisa ngalezo zinguquko. Uma sekuthunyelwe, lezi zinguquko kuMigomo Yokusebenzisa zisebenza ngokushesha. Uma noma yiluphi ushintsho esilwenzayo lungamukeleki kuwe, yeka ngokushesha ukusebenzisa iSayithi. Noma yikuphi ukusetshenziswa kwakho kweSayithi ngemuva kokuthi noma yiziphi izinguquko zeMigomo yethu Yokusebenzisa zisebenze kuzobonisa isivumelwano sakho nalezo zinguquko. Kufanele uhlole futhi njalo futhi ubuyekeze le Migomo Yokusebenzisa ukuze wazi ngamalungelo amanje kakhulu nezibopho ezisebenza esivumelwaneni sakho nathi. Akukho lutho kule Migomo Yokusebenzisa olunikeza amalungelo noma izinzuzo zezinkampani zangaphandle.
TermsAndConditions.access_and_use_description: Le Migomo Yokusebenzisa isebenza kubo bonke abasebenzisi beSayithi. Sihlinzeka ngokuqukethwe kwesayithi (okuchazwe ngezansi) njengenhlonipho kubasebenzisi bethu futhi sikuhlosela izinjongo ezijwayelekile, zolwazi kanye nezemfundo kuphela. Lonke ulwazi oluvela kule sayithi lungashintsha ngaphandle kwesaziso. Sikuvumela ukuthi ufinyelele futhi usebenzise Okuqukethwe Kwesayithi ngezinjongo zomuntu siqu, okungezona ezokuthengisa kuphela futhi ngalokhu sikunikeza imvume yokudawuniloda nokuphrinta Okuqukethwe Kwesayithi ngezinjongo zodwa zokubuka, ukufunda, kanye nokugcina okokusebenza ukuze usetshenziswe okungezona ezohwebo, nezemfundo. Noma yikuphi okunye ukukopisha, ukusatshalaliswa, ukudluliselwa kabusha, noma ukuguqulwa Kokuqukethwe Kwesayithi, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi kunge-elekthronikhi noma ngenye indlela, akuvunyelwe ngaphandle kwemvume yethu ebhaliwe ebhalwe ngaphambili. Uyavuma ukuthi ngeke uhlakaze, uhlakaze, uhlehlise unjiniyela noma uguqule okuqukethwe kwesayithi, noma iyiphi into ekuleli sayithi noma isofthiwe yesayithi. Noma yikuphi ukusetshenziswa okungagunyaziwe noma okunqatshelwe kungafaka umenzi icala icala lomphakathi kanye nokushushiswa ngobugebengu ngaphansi kwemithetho esebenzayo.
TermsAndConditions.user_accounts_description1: Ukusebenzisa izici ezithile zeSayithi kungase kudingeke ukuthi uzenzele igama lomsebenzisi nephasiwedi. Uma kudingeka esicini Sesayithi, i-MST izokwakhela iphasiwedi futhi uzocelwa ukuthi udale igama lomsebenzisi nephasiwedi. Unesibopho sanoma yikuphi ukusebenzisana neSayithi okwenzeka nge-akhawunti yakho yomuntu siqu, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi ukusetshenziswa okunjalo akugunyaziwe noma umuntu wesithathu. Sicela ugcine igama lakho lomsebenzisi nephasiwedi kuvikelekile futhi ungavumeli noma ubani ukuthi asebenzise imininingwane ye-akhawunti yakho ukuze afinyelele Isayithi.
TermsAndConditions.user_accounts_description2: Ama-akhawunti omsebenzisi kufanele asetshenziswe kuphela umuntu othenge ilayisense noma umuntu inkampani emnike ikhodi yelayisensi eyodwa. Amalayisense e-ScanLab awavunyelwe ukuthi kwabelwane ngawo ukuze asetshenziswe kaningi. Ilayisensi ye-ScanLab ayivunyelwe ukuthi isetshenziswe njengendlela yokufundisa noma iziyalezo ngaphandle kwemvume ebhaliwe ye-ScanLab. Noma yikuphi ukwephulwa kwale migomo kuzoholela esinyathelweni somthetho nasekunqanyulweni ngokushesha kokusebenzisa namasevisi.
TermsAndConditions.eligibility_description: Kufanele okungenani ube neminyaka eyi-18 ukuze usebenzise iSayithi. Ngokusebenzisa Isizindalwazi, uyaqinisekisa ukuthi uneminyaka engu-18 ubudala noma ngaphezulu futhi ukwazi ngokugcwele futhi ukwazi ukungena emigomeni, imibandela, izibopho, iziqinisekiso, izethulo, neziqinisekiso ezibekwe kule Migomo Yokusebenzisa, kanye nokuthobela nokuthobela Le Migomo Yokusebenzisa.
TermsAndConditions.intellectual_property_rights_description: ISayithi, Okuqukethwe Kwesayithi kanye nezimpawu zokuthengisa, izimpawu zesevisi namalogo aqukethwe kuyo (“Amamaki”), aphethwe noma anikezwe ilayisense ye-MST, kuncike kumalungelo empahla yengqondo esebenzayo ngaphansi kwe-United States nemithetho yangaphandle kanye nezivumelwano zamazwe ngamazwe. Ngeke neze uthole noma iyiphi inzalo yobunikazi noma amalungelo Kokuqukethwe Kwesayithi noma Amamaki aqukethwe kuleli sayithi. I-MST igodla wonke amalungelo anganikezwanga ngokucacile kuSayithi kanye Nokuqukethwe Kwesayithi. Uthatha zonke izindleko zayo yonke isevisi edingekayo, ukulungisa noma ukulungisa noma iyiphi into oyisebenzisayo ukufinyelela iSayithi. Ngokwezinga umthetho osebenzayo ongase ungakuvumeli ukukhishwa kweziqinisekiso ezishiwo, lokhu okushiyelwa ngenhla kungase kungasebenzi kuwe.

Unqatshelwe ukuhlanekezela imininingwane yakho noma ukuphazamisa iSayithi yethu. Privacy.information_we_collect_description: Siqoqa ulwazi oluvela kuwe ngezindlela ezimbalwa, okuhlanganisa lapho ukhetha ukwabelana nathi ngolwazi ngokulufaka kuSayithi yethu, ngokuposa ongakwenza, nokusebenzisa izinqubo ezizenzakalelayo.
Privacy.information_you_provide_description: Singase sikucele futhi ungase ukhethe ukusinikeza imininingwane ethile yomuntu siqu, njengegama lakho nesibongo, ikheli le-imeyili, ikheli leposi, kanye nenombolo yocingo. Singase siqoqe lolu lwazi ezindaweni ezihlukahlukene, kuhlanganise namakhasi ethu okubhalisa nawokungena ngemvume, ikhasi elithi “Thintana nathi”, noma kwezinye izingxenye zeSayithi yethu.
Privacy.automated_information_collection_descrip: Singase siqoqe imininingwane ethile ngokuzenzakalelayo lapho uvakashela noma usebenzisa iSayithi yethu. Lolu lwazi lungase luhlanganise ikheli lakho le-IP (noma esinye isihlonzi sedivayisi esiyingqayizivele, okuhlanganisa naleyo esingase sabelane ngayo); imininingwane ethile mayelana nesiphequluli sakho, isistimu yokusebenza, nehadiwe; indawo yakho, uma ikhona; i-URL ekubhekise kuSayithi yethu; imisebenzi yakho kuSayithi yethu, okubandakanya okuncamelayo; kanye nolunye ulwazi lokugawula imithi, njengosuku nesikhathi sokuvakasha kwakho. Singase sisebenzise ubuchwepheshe obuhlukahlukene bokulandela umkhondo ukuze siqoqe imininingwane ngokuzenzakalelayo, njengamakhukhi, amabhikhoni ewebhu, imibhalo eshumekiwe, izigxivizo zeminwe zesiphequluli, i-GPS, i-iBeacons, nama-ETags (noma “amathegi ebhizinisi”). Ikhukhi (noma "into okwabelwana ngayo endaweni") yifayela ledatha elibekwe kudivayisi yakho lapho uvakashela iSayithi yethu. Isiphequluli sakho, noma enye isofthiwe (okuhlanganisa i-Adobe Flash), ingakuvumela ukuthi wenqabe noma ususe amakhukhi, kodwa uma wenza kanjalo, ezinye izici zeSayithi yethu zingase zingasebenzi kahle, futhi singase singakwazi ukukhumbula okuncamelayo ngesikhathi esilandelayo lapho usivakashela. Singase futhi sisebenzise izingodo zeseva yewebhu ukuze siqoqe futhi sigcine ulwazi mayelana nokusetshenziswa kweSayithi. Uma uvakashela iSayithi yethu usebenzisa iselula, njenge-smartphone, singase futhi siqoqe ulwazi olwengeziwe edivayisini yakho, okuhlanganisa indawo okuyo, isihlonzi sedivayisi, kanye nolwazi mayelana nenethiwekhi yakho yeselula.
Privacy.user_accounts_description: Ukusebenzisa izici ezithile zeSayithi kungase kudingeke ukuthi uzenzele igama lomsebenzisi nephasiwedi. Unesibopho sanoma yikuphi ukusebenzisana neSayithi okwenzeka nge-akhawunti yakho yomuntu siqu, kungakhathaliseki ukuthi ukusetshenziswa okunjalo akugunyaziwe noma umuntu wesithathu. Sicela ugcine igama lakho lomsebenzisi nephasiwedi kuvikelekile futhi ungavumeli noma ubani ukuthi asebenzise imininingwane ye-akhawunti yakho ukuze afinyelele Isayithi.
Privacy.analytics_services_description: Isayithi lethu lisebenzisa izinsiza zezibalo zenkampani yangaphandle, okuhlanganisa, kodwa akukhawulelwe, ku-Google Analytics. Lawa masevisi angase alandelele imininingwane mayelana nemisebenzi yakho eku-inthanethi ngokuhamba kwesikhathi nakumasayithi ahlukene. Lezi zinsizakalo zisisiza ukuthi sithuthukise iSayithi yethu. Lezi zinsizakalo zingase futhi zisivumele ukuthi sikunikeze izikhangiso eziqondiswe kuwe noma okunye okuqukethwe ongase ube nentshisekelo kukho ngokusekelwe emisebenzini yakho eku-inthanethi. Ungafunda kabanzi nge-Google Analytics nokukhetha kwakho kulesi sixhumanisi. Uma ungathanda ukufunda kabanzi mayelana nezikhangiso eziqondiwe ezingase zisekelwe emisebenzini yakho eku-inthanethi (kanye nokukhetha ongase ukusebenzise kumasayithi athile nabakhangisi) ungase ufise ukuvakashela i-{networkAdvertisingLink} noma {digitalAdvertisingLink} amawebhusayithi. Ukuze ukhethe ukuphuma ekulandeleni i-Google Analytics kuwo wonke amawebhusayithi, vakashela: {googleOptOutLink}.
Privacy.how_we_use_the_information_description: Sisebenzisa ulwazi esiluqoqa kuwena ukuze sikunikeze izinsiza ozicelile futhi sikunikeze ulwazi ongase uluthakasele, olufana nolwazi lwezinsizakalo, izincwadi zezindaba, nezipesheli. Singase futhi sisebenzise ulwazi esiluqoqayo ukwenza ngendlela oyifisayo ulwazi lwakho kuSayithi yethu, ukuze sikunikeze ukwesekwa kwamakhasimende, kanye nokuphoqelela Imigomo yethu Yokusebenzisa.
Privacy.how_and_when_we_share_information: Sabelana Kanjani Futhi Nini Ulwazi Nezinkampani Eziseceleni
Privacy.how_and_when_we_share_information_descri: Singase sabelane ngolwazi esiluqoqayo nabanye abantu ngezinjongo ezihlukahlukene. Isibonelo, singase sabelane ngolwazi nesikole sakho, isikhungo noma umqashi kanye nabahlinzeki besevisi abasisiza emisebenzini yethu yebhizinisi. Singase futhi sabelane ngolwazi lapho kudingwa khona ngokomthetho noma ukuze sanelise noma yimuphi umthetho osebenzayo, iziqondiso, incwadi yokubizela enkantolo, isicelo sikahulumeni, noma enye inqubo yezomthetho. Singase futhi sabelane ngolwazi nabantu besithathu, okuhlanganisa abomthetho, ukuvikela iSayithi yethu nokuphoqelela Imigomo yethu Yokusebenzisa. Futhi sinelungelo lokwabelana ngolwazi esiluqoqayo nezinkampani ezingaphansi kwethu nezinkampani ezingaphansi kwethu kanye nanoma yimuphi umnikazi olandelayo uma kwenzeka kuba nokuhlanganiswa, ukuhlanganiswa, ukuthengiswa kwempahla yethu, noma olunye ushintsho ebhizinisini lethu.
Privacy.co_branded_areas_description: Singase sinikeze izingxenye ezithile zeSayithi yethu ngokuhlanganyela nabantu besithathu, njengabalingani bokukhangisa. Lezi “zindawo ezinegama elihlanganyelwe” zizohlonza umuntu wesithathu. Uma ukhetha ukusebenzisa lezi zindawo ezinezimpawu ezihlanganyelwe, singase sabelane ngolwazi lwakho nomuntu wesithathu ohlonziwe, futhi leyo nkampani yangaphandle ingase iqoqe ulwazi kuwe, ngaphezu kolwazi esiluqoqayo, njengoba kuchazwe ngenhla. Kufanele ubuyekeze izinqubomgomo zobumfihlo zalabo bantu abahlonziwe ukuze uqonde ukuthi baluqoqa futhi balusebenzise kanjani ulwazi.
Privacy.links_to_third_party_sites_description: Isizindalwazi sethu singabandakanya izixhumanisi zamawebhusayithi ezinkampani zangaphandle noma ezinye izinsiza ze-inthanethi. Asinasibopho ngalawa mawebhusayithi namasevisi, futhi angase aqoqe futhi asebenzise ulwazi olumayelana nawe. Kufanele ubuyekeze izinqubomgomo zobumfihlo zalabo bantu besithathu ngaphambi kokusebenzisa izingosi zabo zewebhu noma amasevisi ukuze uqonde ukuthi baluqoqa futhi balusebenzise kanjani ulwazi.
Privacy.third_party_tracking_and_do_not_track: Ukulandela ngomkhondo komuntu wesithathu futhi Ungalandeli
Privacy.third_party_tracking_and_do_not_track_de: Izinkampani zangaphandle zingasebenzisa ubuchwepheshe bokulandelela ngokuxhumene neSayithi yethu, okungase kuhlanganise ukuqoqwa kolwazi mayelana nemisebenzi yakho eku-inthanethi ngokuhamba kwesikhathi kanye nakuwo wonke amawebhusayithi ezinkampani zangaphandle. Le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo ayisebenzi kulobu buchwepheshe bezinkampani zangaphandle ngoba kungenzeka singabulawuli futhi asinasibopho ngabo. I-Do Not Track ubuchwepheshe obuvumela abasebenzisi ukuthi baphume ekulandeleni ngamawebhusayithi abangawavakashele. Okwamanje, asiqapheli noma asithathi sinyathelo mayelana nobuchwepheshe be-Do Not Track.
Privacy.updating_your_information_description: Isayithi lethu lingakuvumela ukuthi ubuyekeze ulwazi esiluqoqa kuwe, olufana nolwazi lokuxhumana. Futhi ungacela ukuthi sibuyekeze imininingwane yakho ngokusithumelela i-imeyili kokuthi {emailLink}. Isayithi lethu lingakuvumela futhi ukuthi ubuyekeze izintandokazi zakho ze-imeyili.
Privacy.how_we_protect_your_information_descript: Sisebenzisa ubuchwepheshe bokuphepha obufanele ngokwezentengiso kanye nezinga lemboni kanye nezivikelo ukuze sivikele ulwazi esiluqoqayo nesilusebenzisayo. Siphinde silindele ukuthi abahlinzeki bethu besevisi bavikele ulwazi ngendlela efanayo. Akukho ukudluliswa kwedatha nge-inthanethi, amanethiwekhi eselula, ukudluliswa okungenantambo noma ukugcinwa kolwazi nge-elekthronikhi, nokho, kungaqinisekiswa ngokuvikeleka okungu-100%. Sicela wazi ukuthi asikwazi ukuqinisekisa ukuvikeleka kwanoma yiluphi ulwazi osithumelela lona.
Privacy.transfer_of_information_to_the_united_st: Uma uvela ezweni okungelona elaseMelika, sicela uqaphele ukuthi ulwazi lomuntu siqu oluthumelayo, kuhlanganise nolwazi olunikezwa ngeSayithi yethu, luthunyelwa endaweni ese-United States. Imithetho yokuvikelwa kwedatha yase-United States ingase yehluke kuleyo yezwe ohlala kulo, futhi ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu lungase lube ngaphansi kwezicelo zokufinyelela ezivela kohulumeni, izinkantolo, noma abomthetho base-United States ngokuvumelana nemithetho yase-United States. Ngokuhlinzeka ngolwazi olunjalo lomuntu siqu, uyavuma (futhi umele ukuthi unegunya lokukuvumela), ukudluliselwa kolwazi olunjalo e-United States ngokusetshenziswa nezinjongo ezichazwe kule Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo.
Privacy.children_privacy_description: Ingosi yethu ihloselwe izethameli ezivamile, futhi asifuni ngamabomu noma siqoqe ulwazi lomuntu siqu ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-18. Ngokuvumelana NoMthetho Wokuvikela Ubumfihlo Bezingane Ku-inthanethi, esimeni lapho sifunda ukuthi siqoqe ulwazi lomuntu siqu enganeni engaphansi kweminyaka engu-13 ngaphandle kokuqinisekisa kwemvume yabazali, sizosusa lolo lwazi ngokushesha okukhulu. Uma ukholelwa ukuthi singase sibe nolwazi lomuntu siqu oluvela noma mayelana nengane, sicela usithinte ku-{emailLink}.
Privacy.privacy_policy_changes_description: Sinelungelo lokushintsha le Nqubomgomo Yobumfihlo nganoma yisiphi isikhathi futhi sizothumela isaziso sanoma yiziphi izinguquko ezinjalo kusayithi lethu. Ukusebenzisa kwakho iSayithi lethu ngemuva kosuku lokusebenza kuhlanganisa ukwamukela kwakho imigomo nemibandela echitshiyelwe. Sinelungelo lokusebenzisa imigomo echitshiyelwe kulwazi esesiluqoqile, kuncike kunoma yiziphi izithiyo zomthetho.
Privacy.contact_us_description: Uma unemibuzo mayelana neNqubomgomo yethu Yobumfihlo, izinqubo, noma ukusebenzisa kwakho Isayithi lethu, sicela usithinte ku-{emailLink} noma usebenzisa ulwazi olungezansi:
